headline: Tesla Warns Of Price Hike: All Model Y Trims Set To Increase By $1000 Starting April 1
summary: On Friday, Elon Musk's EV giant Tesla Inc said that the company will increase the starting prices on all of its Model Y variants starting next month.

headline: Tesla's India Entry Hurdle Lifts, Fisker Hurtling Toward Bankruptcy, Rivian Gets Wall Street's Love And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Tesla shares decline amid concerns over weak first-quarter deliveries, while Rivian impresses Wall Street with new product announcements.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Tesla, Meta And Musk Declares 'Dogecoin To The Moon'
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



This week saw the S&P 500 drop by 0.13%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average slightly fell by 0.02%, and the Nasdaq experienced a 0.7% decrease.

headline: Ahead Of Nvidia's 'Grand' Event, This Analyst Compares AI Revolution To '10 PM In A Party That Goes To 4:30 AM'
summary: Daniel Ives, who is bullish on the Nvidia-led "AI revolution," thinks that the party has just started, according to a recent interview.

headline: Tesla Settles Racial Discrimination Lawsuit With Former Employee
summary: EV giant Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) settled a racial discrimination lawsuit with former employee Owen Diaz.

headline: 'Tesla…Best House On A Bad Block': Analyst Sees Multiple Catalysts For Elon Musk's EV Giant Despite Stock Slump
summary: CFRA Research analyst and Tesla Inc bull Garrett Nelson believes that the current fall in the EV giant's stock is not surprising given shares more than doubled last year.

headline: Apple Fails To Dismiss Lawsuit Claiming AirTags Are Weapon Of Stalkers: 'Determination Cannot Be Made At This Early Stage'
summary: Apple has been denied a motion to dismiss a lawsuit alleging that its AirTag devices are used by stalkers to track their victims, with a U.S. District Judge ruling that the lawsuit can proceed based on claims of flawed safety features causing injuries to the plaintiffs.

headline: Tesla Exec Reacts As Car Enthusiast Expresses Dismay Over Higher Costs At Shell Charging Stations Compared To EV Giant's Superchargers
summary: Tesla Inc executive Drew Baglino on Friday listed the normalization of EV charging prices as one of the benefits of the EV giant opening its supercharging network to rival players.

headline: Elon Musk Reacts After Ex-CNN Anchor Allegedly Demanded Tesla Cybertruck, $5M Cash, Stake In X And Much More To Host His Show On X: 'When Life Gives You Lemons'
summary: Former CNN anchor Don Lemon reportedly had a laundry list of demands to host his show on Elon Musk's X, including a free Cybertruck.

headline: Tesla Hit with $42 Million Verdict: Indiana Jury Finds Elon Musk's EV Giant And Employ Liable in Ford Truck Crash Case
Elon Musk Says 'Woke AI' Like Google Gemini Can Be Deadly: 'It Will Do Whatever It Can...Potentially Even Killing People'
summary: Elon Musk thinks that "woke AI" can be deadly, sounding his concerns about the potential risks of AI programmed to enforce diversity.

headline: Morgan Stanley Analyst Increasingly Bullish On Elon Musk's Tesla Optimus Venture As Jeff Bezos, Nvidia, Microsoft Pour $675M In FigureAI
summary: Morgan Stanley analyst and Tesla Inc bull Adam Jonas sees the theme of humanoid robotics accelerating in the months.

headline: 'Forced Sale Or Ban' On TikTok Will Impact Apple, Tesla Operations In China, Says Top Analyst Gene Munster: 'Will Argue US Tech Companies Are Using Their Products To Spy'
summary: Gene Munster, managing partner at Deepwater Asset Management, voices concerns about potential Chinese retaliation against U.S. tech companies like Apple and Tesla if TikTok is banned or sold in the U.S., citing possible accusations of espionage and potential impact on sales in China.
